issues.title: Missing customer_id in GROUP BY
issues.problem: The query is missing customer_id in the GROUP BY clause, which will cause an error.

issues.title: Case Sensitivity
issues.problem: Table names should be consistent in case. SQL is case-insensitive in some environments, but it's best practice to keep naming consistent.

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining its purpose and logic.
issues.fix: -- Calculate total transaction amount by merchant for completed transactions

review.corrected_sql:
-- Calculate total transaction amount by merchant and customer for completed transactions
SELECT customer_id, merchant_id, SUM(amount)
FROM fact_transactions
WHERE status = 'COMPLETED'
GROUP BY customer_id, merchant_id;
review.summary: The query had a critical correctness issue with the GROUP BY clause and some readability issues. It has been corrected and improved.
